weather.headline: Chance Rain Showers
weather.detail: A chance of rain showers before noon, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 58. North northwest wind 3 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
weather.tonight: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Partly Cloudy
